rationale: The proposed change concerns a property tax homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Fam. Code §261.101 governs mandatory child abuse/neglect reporting duties. The two provisions address entirely unrelated subject matter and share no operative overlap.
quote: Sec. 261.101. PERSONS REQUIRED TO REPORT; TIME TO REPORT.
_note: No conflict. The rule text (child abuse reporting) and the proposed change (homestead exemption amount) are wholly unrelated statutes with no intersecting provisions.
